hero.title: Honoring Africa's
hero.tagline: Advocating & Achieving Education For All In Africa
hero.description: The New Education Standard Award Africa ({{edition}}) celebrates visionary leaders, institutions, and innovators building the future of education across Africa.

watchLive.title: Watch Live
watchLive.description: NESA Africa TV broadcasts on social media, partner stations, and the CAST TV box/app.

quote.text: {{editionName}} is not an event. It is a standards-led education accountability cycle that connects:
quote.footer: Delivered with governance, transparency, and continental relevance.

meta.title: About NESA-Africa | New Education Standard Award Africa
meta.description: NESA-Africa is a governance-grade education accountability platform recognizing Africa's changemakers shaping the future of education.

hero.title: About
hero.description: The New Education Standard Award Africa is not an awards website. It is a governance-grade education accountability platform — celebrating, validating, and amplifying Africa's education champions.

missionSection.title: Our Mission
missionSection.description: To recognize, validate, and celebrate individuals, organizations, and institutions driving Education for All across Africa — through transparent, merit-based awards that inspire action and accountability.

recognition.title: Recognition
recognition.description: Celebrating Africa's education champions through merit-based awards across 17 categories.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: Governance-grade firewalls ensure sponsor independence and voting integrity.

continentalReach.title: Continental Reach
continentalReach.description: Region-first approach covering all 5 African regions plus Diaspora and Friends of Africa.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Driving Education for All through visibility, validation, and volunteer engagement.

awardTiers.title: Award Tiers
awardTiers.description: Four distinct recognition platforms, each with unique criteria and selection processes.

platinum.title: Platinum Certificate
platinum.description: Baseline recognition for service contribution to Education for All. Non-competitive, NRC verified, valid for 1 year.

icon.title: Africa Education Icon
icon.description: Lifetime achievement recognition. 3 subcategories across Africa, Diaspora, and Friends of Africa.

gold.title: Gold Certificate
gold.description: Competitive recognition through 100% public voting. Region-first approach feeds into Blue Garnet.

blueGarnet.title: Blue Garnet Award
blueGarnet.description: Highest honour — 60% Jury scoring, 40% Public voting. 9 winners announced at the live Gala.

categories.title: Award Categories
categories.description: Explore our 17 award categories recognizing excellence across Africa's education sector

meta.title: Award Categories | {{editionName}}
meta.description: Explore all 17 NESA-Africa award categories and 138+ subcategories. Recognizing excellence across education, CSR, technology, and social impact across Africa.

hero.title: 17 Official Award Categories
hero.description: Celebrating excellence in education, corporate responsibility, technology, and social impact across the African continent.

cta.title: Ready to Nominate?

hero.title: Vote for Africa's
